title: AZ-104: Configure and manage virtual networks for Azure administrators
summary: AZ-104: Configure and manage virtual networks for Azure administrators

sections.title: AZ-104: Configure and manage virtual networks for Azure administrators
sections.summary: AZ-104: Configure and manage virtual networks for Azure administrators

lessons.title: Configure virtual networks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to configure virtual networks and subnets, including IP addressing.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-virtual-networks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure network security groups
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement network security groups, and ensure network security group rules are correctly applied.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-network-security-groups/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Host your domain on Azure DNS
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to host the Domain Name System (DNS) records for your domains on Azure infrastructure by using Azure DNS.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/host-domain-azure-dns/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Host your domain on Azure DNS

lessons.title: Configure Azure Virtual Network peering
lessons.content_md:
Learn to configure an Azure Virtual Network peering connection and address transit and connectivity concerns.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-vnet-peering/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Manage and control traffic flow in your Azure deployment with routes
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to control Azure virtual network traffic by implementing custom routes.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/control-network-traffic-flow-with-routes/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage and control traffic flow in your Azure deployment with routes

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Load Balancer
lessons.content_md:
This module explains what Azure Load Balancer does, how it works, and when you should choose to use Load Balancer as a solution to meet your organization's needs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-load-balancer/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Application Gateway
lessons.content_md:
This module explains what Azure Application Gateway does, how it works, and when you should choose to use Application Gateway as a solution to meet your organization's needs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-application-gateway/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Network Watcher
lessons.content_md:
This module explains what Azure Network Watcher does, how it works, and when you should choose to use Network Watcher as a solution to meet your organization's needs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-network-watcher/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica AZ-104: Configure and manage virtual networks for Azure administrators
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **AZ-104: Configure and manage virtual networks for Azure administrators**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
